observations.note: RECURRING live-pixel miss for the auto-session status-strip chips. iter-3 IMPROVED on iter-2 — a real-pixel app render (TC-12-app-loaded.png, 180KB) was captured proving the frontend serves and renders (J-05 controls visibly populated → J-05 pixel debt CLEARED) — and J-12/J-13 are functionally proven by real live-LLM backend runs + the hermetic suite. BUT the specific iter-3 strip chips (token/USD/configs live-updating) and the J-10 reload-mid-run step were NOT captured at the pixel layer: the documented Chrome-MCP hidden-tab throttle was compounded by a concurrent QA holding the foreground tab, and the dedicated browser-qa-agent SKIPPED entirely because the FE/BE were down (HTTP 000) in ITS window (same failure mode as iter-2). J-08/J-10 are marked passing on the spec-sanctioned backend-endpoint + real-live-run + pure-display-component evidence (iter-1/iter-2 precedent). The narrower strip-chip + reload-mid-run pixel debt persists. J-14 adds new UI (SCREEN/PROMOTE activity log) → browser-qa runs again; it MUST run against the same live services in the same window on an uncontended foreground tab and capture these pixels then.

observations.note: J-08/J-10/J-11 + manual regressions J-01/J-05 were verified via the spec-sanctioned backend-endpoint + static-code fallback only. The dedicated browser-qa-agent returned SKIPPED (frontend Vite server HTTP 000 / down mid-window). Live-pixel UI confirmation of the status strip live-updating, cards streaming without reload, and reload-mid-run survival was NOT obtained. PARTIALLY addressed in iter-3 (a real-pixel app render obtained, J-05 pixel cleared); the narrower J-08/J-10 strip-chip + reload-mid-run pixel debt is carried forward by the iter-3 observation above.

observations.anti_goal: GET /api/sessions/{id} (the list/open path) MUST NOT eagerly parse full per-iteration result.json/rating.json payloads; iteration detail is lazy-loaded via the existing per-iteration endpoint.
observations.note: RESOLVED — verdict delivered by the iter-1 coherence-auditor and confirmed by the evaluator. get_session builds its iteration list from read_iteration_meta (lightweight) and lazy-loads heavy result/rating/equity/trades ONLY via GET /{session_id}/iterations/{iteration_id} (session_routes.py:144-184). iter-2/iter-3 re-confirm CONFORMS: the open-universe path persists via the same lightweight write_iteration / lazy-detail; the live poll's mergePolledSession keeps heavy fields lazy. Do not re-litigate.

Backend unit suite: sole failure tests/test_directions_cache.py::test_write_and_read_full_round_trip — the directions cache is goal Capability #10 (nice-to-have), not a Must-have journey nor an anti-goal invariant. Pre-existing on an untouched module; re-confirmed red identically through iter-3 (evaluator re-run: 194 passed, 1 failed = this test, 1 deselected). Not a regression. Anti-goal invariants (test_lookahead, test_determinism, test_sandbox) all PASS.
observations.evidence: reports/qa/goal-financial_free-iter-3-qa.md (§Step 2); evaluator iter-3 re-run (194 passed / 1 failed / 1 deselected)

observations.note: tests/test_auto_session_routes.py::test_post_returns_before_loop_completes_and_get_stays_responsive is flaky under full-suite load (test-scaffolding timing race: gates the background loop on an asyncio.Event and asserts 'running' immediately after POST). Passed in the evaluator's full-suite re-run and in QA's re-run/isolation. NOT a product regression (POST returns 200 immediately, loop runs async). De-flake the scaffold (await the gate-park signal before asserting) in a future iteration.
